title: Sarah Wilson
content:
{{CharHub|Sarah Wilson|Sarah Wilson}} {{Character |image = Sarah Wilson Infobox.png |real name = Sarah Wilson |alias = |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Female |snapped = No{{Ref|TFaTWS101}} |affiliation = [[Wilson Family Seafood]] |movie = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Captain America: Brave New World]]'' (photo)}}}} |tv series = ''[[The Falcon and The Winter Soldier]]'' (5 episodes) |actor = [[Adepero Oduye]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|My world doesn't matter to [[United States|America]], so why should I care about its [[John Walker|mascot]]?|Sarah Wilson to [[Karli Morgenthau]]|The Whole World Is Watching}} '''Sarah Wilson''' is the younger sister of [[Sam Wilson]]. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====[[Wilson Family Seafood]]==== {{Quote|Don’t forget, you joined the [[United States Air Force|Air Force]]. You didn’t see everything [[Darlene Wilson|Mom]] and [[Paul Wilson|Daddy]] dealt with.|Sarah Wilson to [[Sam Wilson]]|New World Order}} Sarah Wilson was born and raised in [[Delacroix]], [[Louisiana]]{{Ref|TMoTFaTWS}} alongside her older[https://x.com/falconandwinter/status/1385428909253033986 ''The Falcon and The Winter Soldier'' on Twitter - April 22, 2021] brother, [[Sam Wilson|Sam]]. From an early age, the siblings were involved in their family's fishing business, spending a lot of time out at sea with their parents, [[Paul Wilson|Paul]] and [[Darlene Wilson]], in their [[Paul & Darlene|boat]]. While Sam left Louisiana to enlist in the [[United States Air Force]] and later become an [[Avengers|Avenger]], Wilson remained at home and continued working at [[Wilson Family Seafood]]. After her parents passed away, Wilson took over the family business. She later married and had two sons, [[AJ]] and [[Cass]] but sometime after their children were born, her husband died, leaving Wilson a widow.{{Ref|TFaTWS101}} ===Financial Troubles=== ====The Snap==== In [[2018]], Wilson survived the [[Snap]], along with both [[AJ]] and [[Cass]], who were toddlers at the time. Over the next five years, she was the sole provider of her family and it was hard for her to maintain [[Wilson Family Seafood]] while raising her sons. After the [[Blip]], Wilson was reunited with [[Sam Wilson|Sam]].{{Ref|TFaTWS101}} ====Visit from Sam Wilson==== [[File:Sarah Wilson smiles.png|{{AltFloat}}|Wilson smiles upon seeing her [[Sam Wilson|brother]] arrive]] {{Quote|I thought we were gonna discuss if we were selling [[Paul & Darlene|it]]."
"We did. And then you were off fighting [[Thanos|Doctor Space Cape]] or whatever while I was holdin’ it together for five long years. Now that the world is [[Blip|going back to normal]], this thing's gotta go.|[[Sam Wilson]] and Sarah Wilson|New World Order}} One day in [[2024]], Wilson was working on her [[Paul & Darlene|family's boat]] when [[Sam Wilson]] drove up to the dock in his truck. After giving him a greeting, she told him that while he was busy being an [[Avengers|Avenger]], she was busy trying to keep their family's business operational. She also told him that they may have to let go of their house due to finances, but Sam was against that. [[File:Sarah Wilson.png|{{AltFloat}}|Wilson at the bank]] Instead, Sam told Wilson that he would fix it and took her to the [[Merchant & Treasury Service|local bank]], where the employee did not recognize Sam at first, to Wilson's amusement. However, their appointment didn't go as well when the employee told them that the bank could not give them the loan. Wilson told Sam that she had to give up the house, but he refused saying he owned half of it also. After this, they returned to the house. [[File:Sarah Wilson (2024).png|{{AltFloat}}|Wilson watches the news]] Back at her house, Wilson told Sam to watch the [[WHiH World News]] report of a [[John Walker|new Captain America]] with the shield being introduced to the world.{{Ref|TFaTWS101}} ====Calling Sam Wilson==== [[File:Sarah Wilson calls her brother.png|{{AltFloat}}|Wilson calls [[Sam Wilson|Sam]]]] While working in her house, Wilson called [[Sam Wilson|Sam]] about the bank loan, not knowing that he was in [[Madripoor]] and asked why he was talking strange. She then told him she had to go after [[Cass|one of her sons]] made a mess.{{Ref|TFaTWS103}} ====Flag Smasher's Threat==== [[File:Sarah speaks with Karli.png|{{AltFloat}}|Wilson speaks to [[Karli Morgenthau]] on the phone]] One night on the docks, Wilson was called by [[Karli Morgenthau]] who asked her if she needed to kill her [[Sam Wilson|brother]] and asked Wilson to ask him to meet with her alone, and if she didn't, she threatened to meet Wilson and her children on the docks. This frightened Wilson and she called her brother.{{Ref|TFaTWS104}} ====Meeting Bucky Barnes==== [[File:Sarah & Sam Wilson.png|{{AltFloat}}|Wilson with her [[Sam Wilson|brother]]]] Later, [[Sam Wilson|Sam]] returned to Wilson's house. Upon arriving, he called their community to help fix their [[Paul & Darlene|family boat]], telling Wilson that she and their mother had given to the community for years, so it would be fine for them to give back. [[File:Sarah Wilson meets Bucky Barnes.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Sarah meets [[Bucky Barnes]]]] The next day, their community came out and helped, much to Wilson's delight. Also appearing was [[Bucky Barnes]] who came with a gift for Sam from the [[Wakanda]]ns. When Barnes met Wilson, he introduced himself and she was pleased to meet him. For the next few days, Wilson worked with her neighbors on the docks, while Sam and Barnes finished with the main repairs of the boat.{{Ref|TFaTWS105}} ====Talk with Sam Wilson==== [[File:Sarah talks to Sam.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Wilson talks with her [[Sam Wilson|brother]]]] After [[Bucky Barnes]] had left them, Wilson decided not to sell their family's boat, much to [[Sam Wilson|Sam]]'s delight. She and Sam then sat down on the docks and talked. Sam told her that he couldn't win every battle, but that preserving everything of their parents' and family history was something they could not lose. [[File:Sarah speaks with Sam.png|{{AltFloat}}|Wilson listens to her [[Sam Wilson|brother]]]] Sam then told Wilson that in the past he could tell that the more he was off away from home, the more he knew Wilson believed he was running away from their family. However, Wilson told him that was untrue and that she never believed that he was running away from them and assured him that she has always been proud of him. Wilson then told Sam that he should not let what [[Isaiah Bradley]] told him deter him from making his own decisions on what to do with becoming Captain America.{{Ref|TFaTWS105}} ===Cookout=== [[File:Sarah watches the news.png|{{AltFloat}}|Wilson sees her [[Sam Wilson|brother]] on the news]] A few nights later, Sarah watched the [[WHiH World News]] and saw her [[Sam Wilson|brother]] in his new Captain America suit, giving his first speech to the world as Captain America. [[File:Sarah Wilson (Delacroix, Louisiana).png|{{AltFloat}}|Wilson prepares for the cookout]] The next day, Wilson hosted a community cookout to celebrate serving shrimp, corn, pecan pie, and other foods in which her brother and [[Bucky Barnes]] came too. She laughed as Barnes showed off his [[Winter Soldier's Prosthetic Arm|vibranium arm]] to the children, and smiled as Sam, being the new Captain America, took pictures with the community.{{Ref|TFaTWS106}} {{Clear}} ==Abilities== {{Quote|I don't come up to the sky to tell you how to barrel roll, so don't come down here and mess around with things you don't understand.|Sarah Wilson to [[Sam Wilson]]|Truth}} *'''Expert Businessperson''': Wilson took over [[Wilson Family Seafood]] at her parents death and had trouble due to the [[Snap]] and the death of her [[Sam Wilson|brother]]. She eventually had to decide between the market and the family boat until Sam devised a plan. *'''Engineer''': [[File:Skilled Sarah.png|thumb|250px|Wilson repairs a component]] Wilson helped fix a component on her front porch. ==Equipment== {{Expand}} ===Vehicles=== *'''''[[Paul & Darlene]]''''': ''To be added'' ==Facilities== {{Expand}} *'''[[Wilson Family Residence]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *Grandfather † *Grandmother † *[[Paul Wilson]] † - Father *[[Darlene Wilson]] † - Mother *Aunt † *[[Sam Wilson|Sam Wilson/Captain America]] - Brother *Husband † *[[AJ]] - Son *[[Cass]] - Son ===Allies=== *[[Wilson Family Seafood]] **[[Carlos (Wilson Family Seafood)|Carlos]] **[[Tommy (Wilson Family Seafood)|Tommy]] *[[Liu (Neighbor)|Liu]] - Neighbor *[[Bucky Barnes]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Karli Morgenthau]] † {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|TFaTWS101}} *{{Appearance|TFaTWS103}} *{{Appearance|TFaTWS104}} *{{Appearance|TFaTWS105}} *{{Appearance|TFaTWS106}} *{{Appearance|CABNW}} (photo) ==Trivia== *In the comics, '''Sarah Wilson Casper''' is [[Sam Wilson]]'s younger sister. ==Behind the Scenes== *Due to the lack of extensive history of Sarah Wilson in the comics, [[Adepero Oduye]] built her performance on the character surrounding the information she could find from the character and from the script for ''[[The Falcon and The Winter Soldier]]'', and focused on building her and [[Sam Wilson]]'s relationship working with [[Anthony Mackie]].[https://www.etonline.com/falcon-and-winter-soldier-adepero-oduye-interview-162702 Adepero Oduye on Joining the MCU in 'The Falcon and the Winter Soldier' (Exclusive)] ==References== {{Gallery|Sarah Wilson/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Sarah Casper}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:The Falcon and The Winter Soldier Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]]

infobox.tv series: ''[[The Falcon and The Winter Soldier]]'' <small>(5 episodes)</small>
